title: IIB ( Israeli Industrial Batteries ) ransomware incident

extortion.description: Handala Hacked IIB ( Israeli Industrial Batteries ) IIB is one of the companies affiliated to the Ministry of Defense of the regime, which is responsible for the design and production of many vital energy storage infrastructures for the military and defense industries of the Zionist regime, such as radars, telecommunication equipment, spying equipment, etc.…
